prompt: Create a realistic outdoor fashion portrait of a young woman with very long wavy black hair standing centered on a quiet park path, facing the camera with a soft confident smile. She is wearing a loose white sleeveless halter mini dress with small black heart prints and a keyhole neckline, lightly holding a section of her hair with one hand while the other arm rests naturally by her side. The setting is a lush green garden avenue with a softly curving paved walkway receding into the background, dense trees on both sides, and abundant hanging clusters of bright yellow flowers overhead and scattered yellow petals on the ground. Include exactly one black wooden park bench on the right side in the midground, partially blurred. Use natural daylight, warm spring atmosphere, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic skin tones, high-detail DSLR photography look, 50mm portrait lens feel, full-body framing from slightly above knee to head with extra environment around her, centered composition, soft background blur, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a realistic outdoor fashion portrait of a young woman with very long wavy black hair standing centered on a quiet park path, facing the camera with a soft confident smile. She is wearing a loose white sleeveless halter mini dress with small black heart prints and a keyhole neckline, lightly holding a section of her hair with one hand while the other arm rests naturally by her side. The setting is a lush green garden avenue with a softly curving paved walkway receding into the background, dense trees on both sides, and abundant hanging clusters of bright yellow flowers overhead and scattered yellow petals on the ground. Include exactly one black wooden park bench on the right side in the midground, partially blurred. Use natural daylight, warm spring atmosphere, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic skin tones, high-detail DSLR photography look, 50mm portrait lens feel, full-body framing from slightly above knee to head with extra environment around her, centered composition, soft background blur, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的户外时尚肖像，主体为 一位留着超长黑色波浪卷发的年轻女性，她正站在安静的公园小径中央，面对镜头，带着自信而柔和的微笑。她身穿 一件宽松的白色无袖挂脖迷你裙，带有黑色小爱心印花和钥匙孔领口，一只手轻轻撩起一缕头发，另一只手臂自然垂在身侧。背景是一条郁郁葱葱的林荫大道，铺设好的小径呈柔和的弧度向远处延伸，两侧树木茂密，头顶悬挂着成簇的明黄色花朵，地面散落着黄色花瓣。在右侧中景处加入一张黑色木质公园长椅，部分虚化。使用自然日光，营造温暖的春日氛围，采用浅景深、奶油般虚化的背景，呈现写实的肤色，具备高细节的单反摄影质感，50mm 人像镜头感，全身构图（从膝盖上方到头部，保留周围环境），居中构图，柔和的背景虚化，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。
